gaps.description: src/index.js missing — package.json 'main' points to src/index.js which does not exist on disk
Docker port mismatch — docker-compose.yml exposes port 3000 but bin/agentic-service.js defaults to 1234; containers will fail healthcheck
ARCHITECTURE.md lines 191-252 contain massive stale CR content (repeated 'Add sections to ARCHITECTURE.md' instructions from prior milestones, never cleaned up)

ARCHITECTURE.md directory tree lists only ~14 src/ files; 20+ additional source files exist (embed.js, vad.js, profiler.js, latency-log.js, store/index.js, adapters/*, cli/*, tunnel.js, cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js)
Dead import maps #agentic-embed and #agentic-voice in package.json — no source file references them
Test pass rate ~96.2% (810/845) with 32 failures across 16 test files — server-layer brain.js tests, hub-brain-api, rest-api-endpoints, and milestone tests failing
ARCHITECTURE.md install section shows docker port 3000 and localhost:3000 — inconsistent with actual default port 1234
src/runtime/adapters/embed.js is a stub that throws 'not implemented' — breaks the adapter pattern (actual embed uses vendor agentic-embed via src/runtime/embed.js)
Docker deployment missing OLLAMA_HOST env var in docker-compose.yml — required for containerized Ollama connectivity
Docker deployment missing ./data volume mount in root docker-compose.yml (install/docker-compose.yml has config volume but root does not)
Server middleware (src/server/middleware.js) is a 4-line error handler — no request validation, rate limiting, or security middleware
